query_string:
with customer_list as (
  select distinct
    customer_id
    , segment
  from l2_verification.tmp_ui_renewal_260218
)

, app_session_master as (
  select
    user_pseudo_id
    , ga_session_id
    , td_time_string(access_date, 'd!', 'jst') as access_date
    , customer_id
    , shop_no
    , traffic_source_medium
  from (
      select distinct user_pseudo_id, ga_session_id, td_date_trunc('day', event_unixtime, 'jst') as access_date
      from _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_app_log_104w
    )
    left join (
        select user_pseudo_id, td_date_trunc('day', event_unixtime, 'jst') as access_date, max_by(customer_id, event_unixtime) as customer_id
        from _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_app_log_104w
        where customer_id is not null
        group by 1,2
      ) using (user_pseudo_id, access_date)
    left join (
        select user_pseudo_id, td_date_trunc('day', event_unixtime, 'jst') as access_date, max_by(shop_no, event_unixtime) as shop_no
        from _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_app_log_104w
        where shop_no is not null
        group by 1,2
      ) using (user_pseudo_id, access_date)
    left join (
        select user_pseudo_id, td_date_trunc('day', event_unixtime, 'jst') as access_date, min_by(traffic_source_medium, event_unixtime) as traffic_source_medium
        from _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_app_log_104w
        group by 1,2
      ) using (user_pseudo_id, access_date)
)
, sys_reservation as (
  select reservation_id, customer_id
  from _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_reservation
  where reserved_from = 'APP' and parent_reservation_id is null
)
, id_map_by_reservation as (
  select
    user_pseudo_id
    , td_time_string(td_date_trunc('day', event_unixtime, 'jst'), 'd!','jst') as access_date
    , max_by(customer_id, event_unixtime) as customer_id
  from
    _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_app_reserve
    inner join sys_reservation using (reservation_id)
  where
    customer_id is not null
  group by
    1,2
)

, merged as (
  select
    td_time_string(td_date_trunc('day', t0.event_unixtime, 'jst'), 'd!', 'jst') as access_date
    , segment
    , t0.user_pseudo_id
    , t4.customer_id
    , t0.ga_session_id
    , t0.event_status
    , t1.reservation_id
  from
    _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_app_log_104w as t0
    left join _integration_datamart.z_tmp_cls_app_reserve as t1
      on t0.user_pseudo_id = t1.user_pseudo_id and t0.ga_session_id = t1.ga_session_id 
        and t0.event_name = t1.event_name and t0.event_timestamp = t1.event_timestamp
    left join app_session_master as t2
      on t0.user_pseudo_id = t2.user_pseudo_id and t0.ga_session_id = t2.ga_session_id
        and td_date_trunc('day', t0.event_unixtime, 'jst') = td_time_parse(t2.access_date, 'jst')
    left join id_map_by_reservation as t3
      on t0.user_pseudo_id = t3.user_pseudo_id
        and td_date_trunc('day', t0.event_unixtime, 'jst') = td_time_parse(t3.access_date, 'jst')
    inner join customer_list as t4 on coalesce(t2.customer_id, t3.customer_id) = t4.customer_id
)

, both_period_session_users as (
  select
    customer_id
    , segment
  from 
    merged
  where
    access_date between '2025-09-18' and '2026-02-28'
  group by
    1,2
  having
    count(distinct case
      when access_date between '2024-12-09' and '2025-02-28' then '刷新前期間' --12-08
      when access_date between '2025-12-09' and '2026-02-28' then '刷新期間'  --02-28
    end) = 2
)

, merged_filtered as (
  select
    t0.*
  from
    merged as t0
    inner join both_period_session_users  as t1
      on t0.customer_id = t1.customer_id
)

, agg as (
  select
    segment
    , case
        when access_date between '2025-09-18' and '2025-12-08' then '刷新前期間'
        when access_date between '2025-12-09' and '2026-02-28' then '刷新期間'
        else 'その他期間'
      end as period
    , count(distinct ga_session_id||user_pseudo_id) as session_count
    , count(distinct if(event_status in (1,2,3,4), customer_id)) as session_uu
    , count(distinct if(event_status in (4), customer_id)) as reservation_complete_uu
    , count(distinct if(event_status in (4), reservation_id)) as reservation_complete_count
  from merged
  group by 1,2
)

select
  segment as "対象/非対象"
  , period as "集計期間"
  , session_count as "セッション数"
  , session_uu as "セッションUU数"
  , reservation_complete_count as "予約完了数"
  , reservation_complete_uu as "予約完了UU数"
  , 1.0 * reservation_complete_count / session_count as "CVR（予約完了数 / セッション数）"
  , 1.0 * reservation_complete_uu / session_uu as "CVR（予約完了UU数 / セッションUU数）"
from agg
where segment <> 'その他'
      and period <> 'その他期間'
order by 1,2
